calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-16-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-16-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: EDWARD JEW FOR PLAINTIFF MAE LEE ALSO PRESENT
DEFENDANT AMOREENA J. MILLS IN PRO PER; NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT JERAMY MILLS

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD AS TO AMOREENA J MILLS. CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. AMOREENA MILLS REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT SHE IS AUTHORIZED AND HAS PERMISSION TO SPEAK FOR HER HUSBAND, JERAMY MILLS AND HE AGREED TO THIS SETTLEMENT. STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AS FOLLOWS: JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF AGAINST AMOREENA J MILLS AND JERAMY MILLS, FOR WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR 482 6TH STREET, #1 AND $7936.98. JUDGEMENT WILL BE STAYED IF TERMS OF SETTLEMENT REACHED. DEFENDANT TO VACATE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 4/15/05 AND TO LEAVE IN A BROOM CLEAN CONDITION. ANY PERSONAL PROPERTY LEFT BEHIND CAN BE DISPOSED OF BY THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF WILL RETURN THE DEPOSIT AND KEY DEPOSIT IN THE SUM OF $995 WHEN DEFENDANT VACATES. IF A REFERENCE IS REQUESTED THE PLAINTIFF WILL STATE THAT DEFENDANT LEFT ON AMICABLE TERMS. BOTH PARTIES AGREED TO THESE TERMS. MR JEW TRANSLATED FOR MAE LEE. IF DEFENDANT FOLLOWS THESE TERMS JUDGMENT WILL NOT BE ENTERED. TRIAL DATE VACATED.
(IN REGAREDS TO JERAMY MILLS, INITIALLY IN DEPT 218 JUDGE VICTOIRE OFF CALENDARED THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE AND STRUCK HIS JURY DEMAND - THIS IS NOW MOOT PER THE ABOVE SETTLEMENT)

JUDGE PRO TEM:DAVID DAWSON ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;CHRISTINA PAXTON (218)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-24-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Amoreena J. Mills, Defendant Propria Persona
Edward Jew, Esq. (415) 433-3350 for Plaintiff and Opposing Party Lee
RULING:
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING:
DEFENDANT AMOREENA MILLS AND JERAMY MILLS' DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT: OVERRULED with 5 days leave to answer from notice of entry of order. Order signed. (301/JLW/CL-X) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
